_doc: Cross-platform decision table for the fetch → accelerator-fallback policy (audit C4 / D3c-01). This is the language-agnostic spec the four imperative fetchers (Kotlin fetchProfileConfigWithFallback + executeRefreshWith, Swift equivalents) implement inline. The JS reference shouldFallbackToAccelerator (src/utils/config-fetch-policy.ts) is asserted against this file by config-fetch-policy.test.ts; a native decision predicate extracted from the state machines must match the same table. Inputs: kind (the primary-request error kind, 'ok' = the primary succeeded), domainVerified, acceleratorConfigured. Rules: HTTP errors and cancellations never fall back; a network fault falls back only when the domain is verified AND an accelerator is configured.
